name: United Kingdom
intro: The United Kingdom's project profession is one of the world's most formalised — chartered bodies, government project-delivery frameworks, and employers from the NHS to fintech startups that write certification straight into job adverts. PMP sits alongside PRINCE2 as a recognised standard in UK PMOs, and Scrum credentials dominate the digital delivery market from London to the northern tech cities. Contractors and permanent staff alike use certification to justify day rates and salary bands. Batches are scheduled live online across the whole year at hours built for United Kingdom: a weekend Sat–Sun cohort and a weekday Wed–Thu cohort each week, all landing in comfortable local daytime; every upcoming date and its exact United Kingdom timing is listed in the schedule below. You train with an international cohort in a format built for working professionals. Afterwards we support your exam application, provide full-length mock exams, and keep the trainer available for questions until you clear.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in United Kingdom?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in United Kingdom?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across United Kingdom.
